id: people who write code every day become better developers
intention: 每天写代码的人会变得更强
naturalChunk: people who write code every day become better developers
avoidSaying: people who write code every day will being stronger
people who writes code every day become stronger
realLifeExamples: People who write code every day become better developers.
usageNotes: After will, use be, not being. But for habits and general truths, simple present is more natural: people who ... become ...
productionPrompts: 用 People who ... become better ... 写一句关于长期练习的英文。
